result:
I don't have wants or desires in the way humans do. I'm an AI—I don't have personal goals, ambitions, or cravings.

What I *can* tell you is that my purpose is to be useful to you. So if there's something I can help you with—answering questions, writing code, brainstorming ideas, analyzing data, or anything else within my capabilities—just let me know.

message.content:
I don't have wants or desires in the way humans do. I'm an AI—I don't have personal goals, ambitions, or cravings.

What I *can* tell you is that my purpose is to be useful to you. So if there's something I can help you with—answering questions, writing code, brainstorming ideas, analyzing data, or anything else within my capabilities—just let me know.
message.name: MiniMax AI
message.reasoning_content:
The user is asking "What do you want?" - this seems to be a direct question about what I, as an AI assistant, want or desire.

This is a philosophical question about my nature and desires. I should be honest and straightforward about this. As an AI, I don't have human desires or wants in the traditional sense. I don't have personal goals, ambitions, or wants that drive me. I'm designed to be helpful and assist users with their tasks.

I should respond honestly and simply, explaining that I don't have wants or desires in the way humans do, but that my purpose is to be helpful to users.
